_comment: Crucible multi-AI provider config. Copy to .crucible/providers.json (per-project) or ~/.claude/crucible/providers.json (global). Per-project wins when both exist. All fields are optional — missing fields fall back to 'claude'.

roles._comment: Each role is independently routable. Set to 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex'. Omit a role to use 'default'. 'worker' is ALWAYS Claude regardless of what you set here — single-writer invariant.

cli._comment: Per-provider CLI invocation. command_prefix is the exact string that prefixes each Bash call (first token must be 'gemini' or 'codex' for allow-pattern matching). stdin_heredoc is the EOF marker used to feed the prompt via heredoc. timeout_ms is per-call. retry is max attempts before falling back to Claude.
